# Miracle of Mind — Meditation Research

> A research-led microsite summarizing 100 peer-reviewed studies on meditation in plain language, alongside Sadhguru's perspective on the mind and the free 7-minute Miracle of Mind (MoM) practice. Science is the lead framing; Sadhguru's words are a separate perspective layer; the MoM practice is the action layer. This is a STAGING build: content is auto-drafted and pending expert medical/scientific review, and is currently set to noindex.

## What this site is

- Purpose: help a research-respecting reader understand what the evidence on meditation does and does not show, with every health claim tied to a specific study and evidence-matched wording (never "cures/treats/heals").
- Scope of practice: MoM is a ~7-minute daily guided practice combining a breath-based process and directed attention. Most studies here examined related breath-and-attention or mindfulness practices, not MoM itself; pages state that transfer gap plainly.
- Claims discipline: findings use claim-strength language; a separate "Why this matters for the 7-minute practice" note gives a hedged mechanistic-transfer inference only where a specific shared mechanism exists.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/): overview and entry point to the seven themes.
- [Research library](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/): all 100 study summaries, filterable by theme and study type.
- [Sadhguru on Meditation](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/wisdom/): verbatim, individually sourced quotes on the nature of mind, organized by theme (perspective layer, kept separate from the science).
- [The Practice](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/practice/): what MoM is and how to start (free app; no ads, no subscription).
- [Methodology](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/methodology/): how the 100 studies were selected, ranked, and worded — full transparency.

## Theme hubs (7)

- [Stress & Anxiety](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/themes/stress-anxiety/): 20 studies.
- [Sleep](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/themes/sleep/): 10 studies.
- [Focus & Attention](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/themes/focus-attention/): 15 studies.
- [Emotional Wellbeing](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/themes/emotional-wellbeing/): 15 studies.
- [Brain & Mechanisms](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/themes/brain-mechanisms/): 20 studies.
- [Clinical Research](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/themes/clinical-research/): 10 studies.
- [Brief & App-Based Practice](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/themes/brief-app-based-practice/): 10 studies.

## Research pages (100)

Grouped by theme. Each links to a single study's plain-language summary, methodology snapshot, limitations, citation, and (where a specific mechanism is shared) a hedged note on relevance to the MoM practice.

### Stress & Anxiety

- [A structured literature review on the role of mindfulness, mindful eating and intuitive eating in changing eating behaviours: effectiveness and associated potential mechanisms (Cross-sectional / Mechanistic, 2017)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/a-structured-literature-review-on-the-role-of-mindfulness-mindful-eati/)
- [Benefits of preparing for childbirth with mindfulness training: a randomized controlled trial with active comparison (RCT, 2017)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/benefits-of-preparing-for-childbirth-with-mindfulness-training-a-rando/)
- [Breathing Practices for Stress and Anxiety Reduction: Conceptual Framework of Implementation Guidelines Based on a Systematic Review of the Published Literature (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2023)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/breathing-practices-for-stress-and-anxiety-reduction-conceptual-framew/)
- [Brief mindfulness-based training and mindfulness trait attenuate psychological stress in university students: a randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2021)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/brief-mindfulness-based-training-and-mindfulness-trait-attenuate-psych/)
- [Cultivating mindfulness: effects on well-being (RCT, 2008)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/cultivating-mindfulness-effects-on-well-being/)
- [Effects of a prenatal mindfulness program on longitudinal changes in stress, anxiety, depression, and mother-infant bonding of women with a tendency to perinatal mood and anxiety disorder: a randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2023)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effects-of-a-prenatal-mindfulness-program-on-longitudinal-changes-in-s/)
- [Impact of Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction training on intrinsic brain connectivity (RCT, 2011)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/impact-of-mindfulness-based-stress-reduction-training-on-intrinsic-bra/)
- [Impact of short- and long-term mindfulness meditation training on amygdala reactivity to emotional stimuli (RCT, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/impact-of-short-and-long-term-mindfulness-meditation-training-on-amygd/)
- [Isha yoga practices, vegan diet, and participation in Samyama meditation retreat: impact on the gut microbiome & metabolome - a non-randomized trial (Cross-sectional / Mechanistic, 2023)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/isha-yoga-practices-vegan-diet-and-participation-in-samyama-meditation/)
- [Large-scale genomic study reveals robust activation of the immune system following advanced Inner Engineering meditation retreat (Cross-sectional / Mechanistic, 2021)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/large-scale-genomic-study-reveals-robust-activation-of-the-immune-syst/)
- [Meditation and Yoga for Irritable Bowel Syndrome: A Randomized Clinical Trial (RCT, 2023)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/meditation-and-yoga-for-irritable-bowel-syndrome-a-randomized-clinical/)
- [Meditation programs for psychological stress and well-being: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2014)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/meditation-programs-for-psychological-stress-and-well-being-a-systemat/)
- [Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction in Post-treatment Breast Cancer Patients: Immediate and Sustained Effects Across Multiple Symptom Clusters (RCT, 2017)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-based-stress-reduction-in-post-treatment-breast-cancer-pat/)
- [Online guided meditation training (Isha Kriya) improves self-reported symptoms of anxiety and depression within 2 weeks of practice-An observational study (RCT, 2022)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/online-guided-meditation-training-isha-kriya-improves-self-reported-sy/)
- [Online Isha Upa Yoga for student mental health and well-being during COVID-19: A randomized control trial (RCT, 2022)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/online-isha-upa-yoga-for-student-mental-health-and-well-being-during-c/)
- [Physical and psychosocial benefits of yoga in cancer patients and survivors, a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2012)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/physical-and-psychosocial-benefits-of-yoga-in-cancer-patients-and-surv/)
- [Slow breathing for reducing stress: The effect of extending exhale (RCT, 2023)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/slow-breathing-for-reducing-stress-the-effect-of-extending-exhale/)
- [The Clinical Efficacy of Mindfulness-Based Treatments for Alcohol and Drugs Use Disorders: A Meta-Analytic Review of Randomized and Nonrandomized Controlled Trials (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/the-clinical-efficacy-of-mindfulness-based-treatments-for-alcohol-and-/)
- [The Effects of Mindfulness Meditation on Nursing Students' Stress and Anxiety Levels (RCT, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/the-effects-of-mindfulness-meditation-on-nursing-students-stress-and-a/)
- [Yoga for breast cancer patients and survivors: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2012)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-for-breast-cancer-patients-and-survivors-a-systematic-review-and-/)

- [The effects of yoga compared to active and inactive controls on physical function and health related quality of life in older adults- systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2019)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/the-effects-of-yoga-compared-to-active-and-inactive-controls-on-physic/)

### Focus & Attention

- [Does mindfulness-based stress reduction training have an impact on the occupational burnout and stress experienced by nurses? A randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2025)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/does-mindfulness-based-stress-reduction-training-have-an-impact-on-the/)
- [Effects of Mindfulness Yoga vs Stretching and Resistance Training Exercises on Anxiety and Depression for People With Parkinson Disease: A Randomized Clinical Trial (RCT, 2019)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effects-of-mindfulness-yoga-vs-stretching-and-resistance-training-exer/)
- [Efficacy of mHealth aided 12-week meditation and breath intervention on change in burnout and professional quality of life among health care providers of a tertiary care hospital in north India: a randomized waitlist-controlled trial (RCT, 2023)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/efficacy-of-mhealth-aided-12-week-meditation-and-breath-intervention-o/)
- [How Breath-Control Can Change Your Life: A Systematic Review on Psycho-Physiological Correlates of Slow Breathing (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/how-breath-control-can-change-your-life-a-systematic-review-on-psycho-/)
- [Mechanisms of mindfulness: emotion regulation following a focused breathing induction (RCT, 2006)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mechanisms-of-mindfulness-emotion-regulation-following-a-focused-breat/)
- [Mindfulness meditation and the immune system: a systematic review of randomized controlled trials (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2016)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-meditation-and-the-immune-system-a-systematic-review-of-ra/)
- [Mindfulness-based interventions for psychiatric disorders: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-based-interventions-for-psychiatric-disorders-a-systematic/)
- [Mindfulness-based stress reduction for healthy individuals: A meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2015)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-based-stress-reduction-for-healthy-individuals-a-meta-anal/)
- [Mindfulness-based therapy: a comprehensive meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2013)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-based-therapy-a-comprehensive-meta-analysis/)
- [Neurobiological Changes Induced by Mindfulness and Meditation: A Systematic Review (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/neurobiological-changes-induced-by-mindfulness-and-meditation-a-system/)
- [The Practice of Hatha Yoga for the Treatment of Pain Associated with Endometriosis (RCT, 2017)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/the-practice-of-hatha-yoga-for-the-treatment-of-pain-associated-with-e/)
- [Yoga as a therapeutic approach to mental health in university students: a randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-as-a-therapeutic-approach-to-mental-health-in-university-students/)

### Brain & Mechanisms

- [A systematic review of the neurophysiology of mindfulness on EEG oscillations (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2015)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/a-systematic-review-of-the-neurophysiology-of-mindfulness-on-eeg-oscil/)
- [Acceptance and Commitment Therapy and yoga for drug-refractory epilepsy: a randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2008)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/acceptance-and-commitment-therapy-and-yoga-for-drug-refractory-epileps/)
- [Changes in Neural Connectivity and Memory Following a Yoga Intervention for Older Adults: A Pilot Study (RCT, 2016)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/changes-in-neural-connectivity-and-memory-following-a-yoga-interventio/)
- [Effectiveness of Yoga in Modulating Markers of Immunity and Inflammation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Cross-sectional / Mechanistic, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effectiveness-of-yoga-in-modulating-markers-of-immunity-and-inflammati/)
- [Effects of yoga in men with prostate cancer on quality of life and immune response: a pilot randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2022)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effects-of-yoga-in-men-with-prostate-cancer-on-quality-of-life-and-imm/)
- [Effects of yoga on the autonomic nervous system, gamma-aminobutyric-acid, and allostasis in epilepsy, depression, and post-traumatic stress disorder (Cross-sectional / Mechanistic, 2012)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effects-of-yoga-on-the-autonomic-nervous-system-gamma-aminobutyric-aci/)
- [Effects of yoga versus walking on mood, anxiety, and brain GABA levels: a randomized controlled MRS study (RCT, 2010)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effects-of-yoga-versus-walking-on-mood-anxiety-and-brain-gaba-levels-a/)
- [Investigation of mindfulness meditation practitioners with voxel-based morphometry (Cross-sectional / Mechanistic, 2008)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/investigation-of-mindfulness-meditation-practitioners-with-voxel-based/)
- [Meta-analytic evidence that mindfulness training alters resting state default mode network connectivity (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2022)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/meta-analytic-evidence-that-mindfulness-training-alters-resting-state-/)
- [Mind the Hype: A Critical Evaluation and Prescriptive Agenda for Research on Mindfulness and Meditation (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mind-the-hype-a-critical-evaluation-and-prescriptive-agenda-for-resear/)
- [Mindful attention to breath regulates emotions via increased amygdala-prefrontal cortex connectivity (RCT, 2016)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindful-attention-to-breath-regulates-emotions-via-increased-amygdala-/)
- [Mindfulness Meditation and Network Neuroscience: Review, Synthesis, and Future Directions (RCT, 2025)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-meditation-and-network-neuroscience-review-synthesis-and-f/)
- [Mindfulness meditation improves emotion regulation and reduces drug abuse (RCT, 2016)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-meditation-improves-emotion-regulation-and-reduces-drug-ab/)
- [Physiology of long pranayamic breathing: neural respiratory elements may provide a mechanism that explains how slow deep breathing shifts the autonomic nervous system (Cross-sectional / Mechanistic, 2006)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/physiology-of-long-pranayamic-breathing-neural-respiratory-elements-ma/)
- [Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/review-of-the-neural-oscillations-underlying-meditation/)
- [The Impact of Mindfulness Meditation on the Wandering Mind: a Systematic Review (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2021)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/the-impact-of-mindfulness-meditation-on-the-wandering-mind-a-systemati/)
- [The influence of mindfulness meditation combined with progressive muscle relaxation training on the clinical efficacy and quality of life of patients with sarcopenia receiving haemodialysis: a randomised controlled trial (RCT, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/the-influence-of-mindfulness-meditation-combined-with-progressive-musc/)
- [The Meditative Mind: A Comprehensive Meta-Analysis of MRI Studies (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2015)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/the-meditative-mind-a-comprehensive-meta-analysis-of-mri-studies/)
- [Yoga and heart rate variability: A comprehensive review of the literature (RCT, 2016)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-and-heart-rate-variability-a-comprehensive-review-of-the-literatu/)
- [Yoga Nidra for hypertension: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-nidra-for-hypertension-a-systematic-review-and-meta-analysis/)

### Clinical Research

- [Effect of mindfulness yoga on anxiety and depression in early breast cancer patients received adjuvant chemotherapy: a randomized clinical trial (RCT, 2022)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effect-of-mindfulness-yoga-on-anxiety-and-depression-in-early-breast-c/)
- [Effects of Breathing Exercises in Patients With Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease: A Network Meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effects-of-breathing-exercises-in-patients-with-chronic-obstructive-pu/)
- [Randomised controlled trial of yoga and bio-feedback in management of hypertension (RCT, 1975)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/randomised-controlled-trial-of-yoga-and-bio-feedback-in-management-of-/)
- [Yoga as an adjunctive treatment for posttraumatic stress disorder: a randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2014)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-as-an-adjunctive-treatment-for-posttraumatic-stress-disorder-a-ra/)
- [Yoga for anxiety: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-for-anxiety-a-systematic-review-and-meta-analysis-of-randomized-c/)
- [Yoga for depression: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2013)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-for-depression-a-systematic-review-and-meta-analysis/)
- [Yoga for treating low back pain: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2022)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-for-treating-low-back-pain-a-systematic-review-and-meta-analysis/)
- [Yoga research review (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2016)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-research-review/)
- [Yoga, mindfulness-based stress reduction and stress-related physiological measures: A meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2017)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-mindfulness-based-stress-reduction-and-stress-related-physiologic/)
- [Yoga, Physical Therapy, or Education for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Randomized Noninferiority Trial (RCT, 2017)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/yoga-physical-therapy-or-education-for-chronic-low-back-pain-a-randomi/)

### Brief & App-Based Practice

- [A randomised active-controlled trial to examine the effects of an online mindfulness intervention on executive control, critical thinking and key thinking dispositions in a university student sample (RCT, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/a-randomised-active-controlled-trial-to-examine-the-effects-of-an-onli/)
- [A randomised controlled trial of a brief online mindfulness-based intervention (RCT, 2013)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/a-randomised-controlled-trial-of-a-brief-online-mindfulness-based-inte/)
- [Brief mindfulness training for negative affectivity: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2018)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/brief-mindfulness-training-for-negative-affectivity-a-systematic-revie/)
- [EEG based interpretation of human brain activity during yoga and meditation using machine learning: A systematic review (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2021)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/eeg-based-interpretation-of-human-brain-activity-during-yoga-and-medit/)
- [Effect of a single session of yoga and meditation on stress reactivity: A systematic review (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2024)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effect-of-a-single-session-of-yoga-and-meditation-on-stress-reactivity/)
- [Effectiveness of online mindfulness interventions on medical students' mental health: a systematic review (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2021)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effectiveness-of-online-mindfulness-interventions-on-medical-students-/)
- [Effects of Mobile Mindfulness Meditation on the Mental Health of University Students: Systematic Review and Meta-analysis (Meta-analysis / Systematic review, 2023)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/effects-of-mobile-mindfulness-meditation-on-the-mental-health-of-unive/)
- [Guided Self-Help Works: Randomized Waitlist Controlled Trial of Pacifica, a Mobile App Integrating Cognitive Behavioral Therapy and Mindfulness for Stress, Anxiety, and Depression (RCT, 2019)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/guided-self-help-works-randomized-waitlist-controlled-trial-of-pacific/)
- [Health Care Workers' Need for Headspace: Findings From a Multisite Definitive Randomized Controlled Trial of an Unguided Digital Mindfulness-Based Self-help App to Reduce Healthcare Worker Stress (RCT, 2022)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/health-care-workers-need-for-headspace-findings-from-a-multisite-defin/)
- [Mindfulness meditation training alters stress-related amygdala resting state functional connectivity: a randomized controlled trial (RCT, 2015)](https://svsashank.github.io/mom-meditation-microsite/research/mindfulness-meditation-training-alters-stress-related-amygdala-resting/)
